# Irfan Shaikh - 3D Interactive Resume

This is the developer portfolio and 3D interactive resume of Irfan Shaikh, a Web Developer and AI Enthusiast currently pursuing a Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA).

## Core Sections

- [About Irfan](https://irfanshaikhportfolio.netlify.app/#about) - Learn about Irfan's career journey, studies, and development philosophy.
- [Portfolio & Projects](https://irfanshaikhportfolio.netlify.app/#work) - Explore key full-stack and web projects including CaseSight AI, AI Architecture Generator, and Hotel Everest.
- [Technical Skills](https://irfanshaikhportfolio.netlify.app/#skills) - Details on programming languages, frontend/backend frameworks, database engines, and AI/ML technologies.
- [Services](https://irfanshaikhportfolio.netlify.app/#services) - Professional services offered by Irfan Shaikh.
- [Contact Info](https://irfanshaikhportfolio.netlify.app/#contact) - Get in touch with Irfan via email, phone, or LinkedIn.

## Technical Details
This application is a React 19 single-page application built on Vite and Tailwind CSS. Static assets are served in optimized WebP formats, and heavy UI sections are dynamically lazy-loaded using React Suspense and Intersection Observers.
